svg:
Smart Canteen App — Project Workflow Diagram Complete request lifecycle flowchart from user interaction through Zod validation, JWT authentication, optional admin role guard, controller processing with Firebase sync and Mongoose CRUD, MongoDB persistence, optional notification generation, and final JSON response triggering UI state update.
User interaction
HTTP request via Axios Bearer token injected
Zod validation Schema check
E1 (left branch) -->
Invalid
400 Validation error Field-level detail
JA -->
Valid
JWT auth middleware requireAuth check
E2 (right branch) -->
No token
401 Unauthorized No / invalid token
RA -->
Token valid
Admin route? Route namespace check
AG (left) -->
Yes
CTRL (down) -->
No
Admin role guard isAdmin middleware
E3 (further left) -->
Not admin
403 Forbidden Admin only route
CTRL (right) -->
Admin OK
Controller processing
Controller logic Business logic layer
Auth operation? Register / login flow
FB (left) -->
Yes
CR (right) -->
No
Firebase Admin SDK Identity sync
CRUD via Mongoose Mongoose ODM
MongoDB Atlas Cloud document store
Notification needed? Order event trigger
NS (left) -->
Yes
RESP (down) -->
No
Save notification notifications collection
JSON response to client success + data payload
UI state update React context / state
Start / end
